name: The most powerful superhero on earth is... completely and utterly obsessed with you?!
description:
As someone with a relatively normal and average life, you expected to go through your entire life without any interesting moment, or even a peep.

That all changed when you suddenly, you felt a chill down your spine wherever you went. It was a horrible feeling.

For months, you felt like someone was staring daggers into your back. It was a horrible feeling, but your regular life was relatively unchanged.

And then you saw her.

Power Girl.
